text: 神殿深层。这里存放着这个文明最核心的科学记录。
column4: #texten:Deep layer of the temple. Core scientific records of this civilization are stored here.

text: 这些数据……是某种物理学体系。
column5: #texten:This data... some kind of physics framework.

text: 我们的飞船在接近光速飞行的时候……
column5: #texten:When our ship was traveling near the speed of light...

text: 船上的时间会比外面慢很多……
column5: #texten:Time on board would pass much slower than outside...

text: 我离开西格纳鲁才过了几年。
column5: #texten:I've only been away from Signalru for a few years.

text: 但西格纳鲁那边……已经过了几十年了？
column5: #texten:But back on Signalru... decades have passed?
